data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to confirm the requirement of holding seats during the payment process for 10 minutes. However, the evidence provided does not include any API reads or persisted state checks that demonstrate this functionality is operational. The linked use case explicitly states that seats are held for 10 minutes during checkout, but there is no evidence confirming that this requirement has been implemented or validated, indicating a clear gap in the requirement coverage.
gaps: No evidence confirming the implementation of the seat holding functionality during the payment process.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Verify seat holding functionality
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Check that the API allows holding seats for 10 minutes during the payment process.
